message:
chore: bump version to 0.1.24

Includes fsqlite WAL concurrency fixes (mmap SHM + POSIX file locking)
that resolve database corruption under concurrent multi-agent access (#158).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
